title: connaraceae
intro: The Connaraceae rank, also known as the staff vine family, is a small but distinctive family of flowering plants. It is characterized by its unique flowers and fruits, which often have a woody, staff-like structure. The Connaraceae family consists of approximately 200 species, primarily found in tropical regions of the world. These plants are often climbers or small trees, and are commonly known for their attractive flowers and edible fruits.
